label: garden_plan
value: With a generous budget, planning to get high-quality seeds and plants for the upcoming planting season.

label: food_preferences
value: Interested in vegetarian recipes using fresh garden produce, specifically tips on keeping vegetables crisp and flavorful when cooking, and suggestions for sides like steamed rice or quinoa, garlic naan, sesame seeds, crushed nuts, pickled vegetables, crusty bread, salad, herb butter, roasted sweet potatoes, grilled corn on the cob, avocado salsa, and quinoa or couscous salad.

label: hobbies_and_projects
value: Enjoys hiking on steep trails and looking for more challenging nature walks, interested in joining local groups or clubs that organize challenging hikes.

label: book_club_details
value: Meets monthly with about fifteen members, looking for a good historical fiction novel for the next meeting.

label: retirement_community_interest
value: Considering moving to a retirement community that offers an active social life, with considerations for financial situation.

label: upcoming_events
value: Coordinating a fall festival and a holiday bazaar, seeking advice on managing time effectively for these events

label: genealogical_research_interest
value: Spending a lot of time at the historical society looking through their archives after finding old letters and photos that opened up a whole new world of genealogical research.
